summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Core MSCI International Developed Markets ETF (IDEV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI World ex USA IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of large-, mid, and small-cap stocks from developed countries, excluding the US. IDEV was launched on Mar 21, 2017 and is issued by BlackRock.

holdings.infoBox: IDEV is an equity ETF with a total of 2344 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 2.41%, HSBC Holdings at 1.17%, Royal Bank of Canada at 1.02%, Roche Holding AG at 1.01%, and Novartis AG at 0.98%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
